Vibrant & Long-Lasting Blooms – Enjoy stunning flowers in a range of colours all summer through to autumn.
Hardy Perennial Variety – Designed to thrive in the UK climate, ideal for garden beds, borders, or containers.
Easy to Grow & Maintain – Prefers full sun and well-drained soil; light pruning keeps plants looking their best.
Planting Time: Jan - May, Sept - Nov
